name: Eternal Requiem
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, shuffle 1 "Silver Key Radiance" with {Destroy} into the Draw Pile. After releasing Posse, the wielder's Crit. DMG +[StateArg1]%. When the wielder deals DMG, gain Keyflare equal to [StateArg2]% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen and [StateArg3]% Temporary Crit. Rate, up to 5 times per turn.
